## Problem

What user workflow is currently blocked or awkward?

## Proposal

Describe the requested behavior and any relevant CLI, rendering, or integration details.

## Alternatives considered

List any other approaches you evaluated.

## Additional context

Link related issues, docs, or example plans if relevant.
